commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps WhatsApp Baileys sendMessage and sendPresenceUpdate operations with a configured socket-operation timeout, updates retry/late-echo handling, adds WhatsApp tests, and revises WhatsApp timing docs/config copy.

PR surface: Source +288, Tests +91, Docs 0. Total +379 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main directly awaits Baileys sendMessage and sendPresenceUpdate promises, so a never-settling operation can hang outbound work. I did not establish a live WhatsApp/Baileys network reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of compatibility/message-delivery semantics on a protected maintainer PR, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: fix(whatsapp): bound socket operations
target.body:
## Summary
- Bound WhatsApp Baileys `sendMessage` and `sendPresenceUpdate` operations with a timer-safe socket-operation wrapper.
- Preserve unknown-delivery semantics by treating local send timeouts as terminal/non-retryable while still recording late message ids only for self-echo suppression.
- Apply the same bound to the QA driver and align the existing `web.whatsapp.defaultQueryTimeoutMs` config/docs wording.

## Rationale
PR #89807 identifies a real WhatsApp hang class, but its implementation only wrapped `send-api`, used a hardcoded 30s timeout, and missed raw reply/media/QA-driver send paths. This implementation keeps the fix in the WhatsApp plugin socket seam and reuses the existing timing surface.

## Verification
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/schema.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/socket-timing.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/monitor-inbox.behavior.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/qa-driver.runtime.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm lint:extensions`
- `pnpm lint:core`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/channels/whatsapp.md extensions/whatsapp/src/inbound/monitor.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/monitor-inbox.streams-inbound-messages.test-support.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/qa-driver.runtime.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/qa-driver.runtime.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/socket-timing.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/socket-timing.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/types.base.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

Proof gap: no live WhatsApp/Baileys network send was run.

Related: #89807
target.author: mcaxtr
